title: Lissochilus anjoanensis
taxonomy: Lissochilus anjoanensis is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is native to tropical Africa and is classified as a terrestrial orchid. It has a distinctive growth habit, with long stems that support a cluster of leaves and a single flower spike. The classification of Lissochilus anjoanensis is further divided into two subspecies: Lissochilus anjoanensis subsp. anjoanensis and Lissochilus anjoanensis subsp. nyassae. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and taxonomy of this species.
